event_description: User successfully bribes Anya the cat with a treat, unlocking the contact links.
User clicks a contact link (Book a call, LinkedIn, or Email) after unlocking the contact section.
User clicks the CTA link on a work project card.
User clicks the View Work or Say Hi CTA button in the hero section.
User views a specific blog post page — top of the content engagement funnel.
User clicks a tag to filter blog posts by topic.
User clicks a social media link (LinkedIn, Twitter, or GitHub) in the footer.
